details: Quote 'Table 2: benzene exp. bp 80 deg C' is a constructed paraphrase, not verbatim. The actual Dearden 2003 (DOI 10.1897/01-363, file '2009_Dearden_...' which is in fact the 2003 paper) Table 2 row reads 'Benzene 80.1 102.2 77.3 78.9 86.5 85.9 102.3 4.090 ...'. Experimental BP value is 80.1, not 80; value extracted lost precision and quote is not verbatim.

PMC11208899 Table 2 contains verbatim 'Cu-MOF catalyzed synthesis of benzoxanthenone derivatives (4a–j) ... 5 4e 50 80 193–194 c ...' matching evidence_quote. Compound 4e mp 193–194 °C confirmed. PMC ID matches, value=193.5 is midpoint.

khan_2017_piroxicam_cocrystal.pdf Table 2 confirms Piroxicam-saccharine sodium cocrystal (1:1) mp 181-183. DOI 10.15171/apb.2017.048 not in PDF text but paper title and Adv Pharm Bull 2017 7 citation match. Value 182 °C is midpoint of 181-183 ✓.

Quote 'Table III: 1,2,3,5-tetrachlorobenzene BP 519 MP 327' is a constructed paraphrase, not verbatim. OCR of 1990 Yalkowsky Pharm. Res. Table III row 4 (page 4) reads '1,2,3,5-Tetrachlorobenzene 519 327 328 —] 0.30 3.0 3'. Value MP=327 K (53.85 °C) is correct and conversion math is right, but quote is paraphrased.

Source URL DOI 10.1002/chem.202500386 does not appear in paper PMC12987641; the paper's actual DOI is 10.1002/cmdc.202500751 (matches journal ChemMedChem in citation). Quote 'mp 308°C–309°C' is verbatim for compound 11c. Additionally compound_name 'Trifluoromethyl)Phenyl)‐7H‐Indeno[2,1‐c]Quinolin‐7‐One (11c)' is malformed (truncated leading '12-(4-(' missing).

PMC6146942 Table 1 row '2a C 15 H 11 ClN 2 S 286.8 Cl H 153-154 69 ...' confirms compound 2a is '2-Methyl-3-phenylquinazoline-4(3H)-thione' (NOT '3-(2-hydroxyphenyl)-2-thioxo-2,3-dihydropyrido[2,3-d]pyrimidin-4(1H)-one'). The CSV compound name is a completely different chemical class (pyrido[2,3-d]pyrimidine vs quinazoline). Value 153-154 °C is in paper but for different compound.

liu_2023_inorganic_eutectic_pcm.pdf abstract contains verbatim 'the optimum content of AASD in the binary eutectic salt is 55 wt%, the melting point was 76.4 °C'. DOI 10.1039/D3RA01118F confirmed in paper. Value 76.4 °C matches.

PMC12941058 article confirms 'Synthesis of 4- N -(3-chlorophenyl)-6-(2,5-dimethylphenylacetylene) quinazoline ( 6b ) QN019 An amount of 50 mg, 65%; mp: 223–225 °C' verbatim. DOI 10.3390/ijms27041738 matches. Value 224 °C midpoint of 223-225.
PMC3127127 Table 5 confirms '5-nonanol 13.4120 3.0580 195.1 195.4 −0.3' — experimental BP column = 195.1 °C. DOI 10.3390/ijms12042448 matches. Quote substantially matches Table 5 content.

PMC10804403 contains verbatim 'to obtain 3 (708 g, 1.520 mol, 90%) as a yellow solid. HPLC (C18) P HPLC 100%, t R 7.3 min. mp = 159–166 °C (lit. = 160 °C)'. PMC ID matches. Value 162.5 midpoint of 159-166.
khan_2019_diclofenac_ester_cocrystal.pdf Table 3 row '10:0' shows 173.2 ± 0.2 for pure diclofenac acid mp. DOI 10.1016/j.heliyon.2019.e02946 matches. Quote captures table content adequately.

Source URL DOI 10.1002/cbdv.202500394 does not appear in paper PMC13006720; the paper's actual DOI is 10.1002/ardp.70227 (Arch. Pharm., not Chemistry & Biodiversity). Quote 'Morpholino{1‐[5‐(5‐nitrofuran‐2‐yl)‐1,3,4‐thiadiazol‐2‐yl]piperidin‐4‐yl}methanone ( 16 ): Yellow solid, mp 269°C–271°C' is verbatim. Value correct, but DOI is wrong.

Compound name field contains spurious prefix 'NO 2 + = 362.21146, found = 362.21126 [M + H] + ; calc. for C 24 H 27 NNaO 2 + = 384.19340 ...' from preceding MS data; the actual compound name '(2E,4E)-N-isobutyl-5-(3-((3-methylbut-2-en-1-yl)oxy)phenyl)penta-2,4-dienamide (24)' is appended but the field is malformed. DOI 10.3390/ijms27041716 matches; quote 'Mp 103–104 °C' verbatim in paper. Compound_name field is corrupted.

Quote 'Table III: 2-chlorobromobenzene BP 477 MP 261' is a constructed paraphrase. OCR of 1990 Yalkowsky Pharm. Res. Table III page 3 reads '2-Chlorobromobenzene 477 261 277 — 16 0.30 2.7 2'. MP=261 K and conversion to -12.15 °C are correct, but quote is paraphrased, not verbatim.

PMC12984852 contains verbatim '4.1.20. 6-Methyl-1-(4-methylbenzyl)- N -(piperidin-1-yl)-1,4-dihydroindeno[1,2- b ]pyrrole-3-carbohydrazide ( 2a ) ... carbohydrazide 2a was isolated as a beige solid (20 mg, 16.80%). M.p.: 165–168 °C'. DOI 10.3390/ijms27052306 matches. Value 166.5 midpoint.

dichi_2025_polyphenols_thermal.pdf Table 1 confirms 'Trans-polydatin 504.65 503.15 [36], 501.15 [37], 495.85 [38]'. DOI 10.3390/molecules30010199 matches. Conversion 504.65 K - 273.15 = 231.50 °C correct.

PMC12938810 contains verbatim 'Synthesis of N′-(1-(3-aminophenyl)ethylidene)-3-((1,3,7-trimethyl-2,6-dioxo-2,3,6,7-tetrahydro-1H-purin-8-yl)thio)propanehydrazide ( AL4 ). M.p.: 231.5 °C (dec.).' DOI 10.3390/antiox15020217 matches. data_type=measured with (dec.) suffix; property=decomposition is appropriate.

elbeih_2022_an_negdn_energetic_composite.pdf Table 1 row 'AN/NC-DEGDN 187.5 192.3 4.8 1961.8 204.4 212.4 8 935.04 2896.84' confirms 2nd decomp T peak = 212.4 °C. DOI 10.3390/molecules27227932 matches. Quote captures full row content.

khalifa_2024_thiopyrimidine_sulfonamide.html section 3.1.5 (M6) contains verbatim 'White powder, mp 242–245 °C, 696 mg, 93%. 1H NMR (400 MHz, DMSO-d6) δ 1.03 (t, J = 7.1 Hz, 6H), 3.15 (q, J = 7.1 Hz, 4H), 4.19 (s, 2H), 7.46 (d, J = 8.4 Hz, 2H), 7.73–7.78 (m, 6H), 10.70 (s, 1H).' DOI 10.3390/molecules29194778 matches; compound name matches M6 header.

PMC6263281 compound 9b is '(E)-6-(1-Heptenyl)salicylic acid' with Mp 70–72 °C (verbatim '3.2.11. ( E )-6-(1-Heptenyl)salicylic acid ( 9b ) ... Mp 70–72 °C'). The CSV claims compound 9b = 'N-(2-hydroxyphenyl)-2-(2-(pentadec-4-en-1-yl)phenoxy)acetamide' with mp 68-70 °C — both the compound name and value range disagree with paper. Likely from a different paper or fabricated.

PMC9188358 contains verbatim 'Ethyle 1-hydroxy-1H-indole-2-carboxylate 2b. White solid; mp 175–177 °C.' (paper has typo 'Ethyle' instead of 'Ethyl'). DOI 10.1007/s42250-022-00374-9 referenced. Value 176 midpoint.
dichi_2025_polyphenols_thermal.pdf Table 1 confirms 'Kaempferol 557.51 558.15 [39], 561.23 [40], 560.15 [41]'. DOI 10.3390/molecules30010199 matches. Conversion 557.51 K - 273.15 = 284.36 °C correct.

Quote 'Table III: 4-chlorofluorobenzene BP 403 MP 246' is a constructed paraphrase. OCR of 1990 Yalkowsky Pharm. Res. Table III page 4 reads '4-Chlorofluorobenzene 403 246 229 17 0.30 3.7 0'. MP=246 K and conversion to -27.15 °C are correct, but quote is paraphrased not verbatim.

PMC6236359 contains verbatim '3-Nitro-10H-benzo[i]quino [2,3,4-kl]acridin-10-one ( 20 ): ... afforded 20 (48 mg, 53%), yellow needles, m.p. 339°C'. Compound name in CSV is descriptive label 'Compound 20 (nitro-pyrido acridine derivative)' — short label refers to correct compound. PMC ID matches; quote verbatim; value 339 °C correct.

PMC6236359 contains verbatim 'compound 5b was isolated (150 mg, 48%): red prisms (from EtOH), m.p. 214°C.' Compound name in CSV is descriptive label 'Compound 5b (dimethoxy-substituted pyrido acridine precursor)' — refers to correct compound. PMC ID matches; quote verbatim; value 214 °C correct.
